title: Business Operations Executive (Medical Aesthetics)
description:
ClearSK is a leading aesthetics and healthcare chain with a strong presence in Singapore, Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Kuala Lumpur. We offer an unparalleled opportunity for career growth in a multi-disciplinary environment.


The Role:

As a Business Operations Executive, you will work closely with the Director of Operations to implement and optimize workflows and systems from the headquarters to frontline operations. Upon confirmation, you will be promoted to the Assistant Manager level and placed on a fast-track on-the-job training program to reach the Manager level within a year.


Ideal Candidate:

We seek individuals who are goal-oriented, adaptable, analytical, and possess strong interpersonal skills and emotional intelligence. Self-motivation, ethical conduct, and team collaboration are also highly valued.


Benefits:

  • 5-day workweek
  • Comprehensive on-the-job training
  • Fast-track career path to Manager within a year
  • Generous Free Treatments Money for wellness and aesthetics treatments
  • Group Hospitalization and Medical Benefits
  • Office locations in Singapore are conveniently located at Novena Medical Center, next to MRT stations.

Responsibilities:

  • Understand and document existing workflows and systems in a structured manner.
  • Assist the Director of Operations, liaise with Doctors, and work with Clinic Managers in implementing these processes across various departments.
  • Collaborate effectively with team members across different levels and departments, including Doctors, Clinic Managers, and the Director of Operations.
  • Utilize analytical tools to monitor the effectiveness of implemented processes.
  • Adapt to changes and provide solutions for unexpected challenges.

Skills:

  • Strong computational thinking and excellent command of the English language.
  • Exceptional interpersonal skills, with the EQ to manage and interact effectively with Doctors, Clinic Managers, and the Director of Operations.
  • Ability to communicate protocols in a manner that is firm, calm, and sensitive.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in a related field such as Business Administration, Allied Health Sciences, Data Science, Computer Science, Chemical Engineering, Quantitative Economics, or Business Analytics, preferably with 2 years of relevant experience.

Application Process:

Should you wish to be considered for shortlisting, please complete the attached Google Form at the link below prior to submitting your application:

Complete the form before applying:
https://forms.gle/BANHb1kAYwBY7k6D8

Pay package within the stated range will be commensurate with relevant experience and educational qualifications.

Please be advised that only candidates who have completed the form and are subsequently shortlisted will be notified.

postedCompany.description: ClearSK manages the award-winning ClearSK® chain of medi-aesthetic centres with presence in Singapore, Shanghai, Hangzhou and Kuala Lumpur. As a Singapore leading aesthetics and healthcare chain, you are expected to achieve high sales and have the opportunity to collaborate closely with aesthetic doctors and clinicians. It will be a great opportunity for you to grow and learn in a multi-disciplinary environment with medical and management professionals. If you have the drive, adaptability and proven sales ability in beauty, wellness and consumer lifestyle sectors, we welcome you to apply.
postedCompany.name: CLEARSK HEALTHCARE PTE. LTD.
